description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures in a dramatic, emotional pose. One figure, draped in a cloak or shroud, sits upright while supporting the limp body of a second, reclining figure across a stone-like base. The figures are rendered in a realistic style, with visible musculature and expressive postures. The base of the sculpture is rectangular and features graffiti in yellow, black, and red paint on multiple sides. The surface of the sculpture appears weathered, with a patina suggesting it is made of stone or bronze. The overall impression is somber and monumental, evoking themes of loss, mourning, or protection.
description: A weathered, realistic sculpture of two human figures—one upright and cloaked, the other reclining—on a rectangular base with visible graffiti. The piece is somber and monumental, with a rough, patinated surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright, cloaked figure supporting the limp, reclining figure; yellow graffiti is visible on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the back of the upright figure and the outstretched form of the reclining figure; black graffiti is visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the draped cloak of the upright figure and the solid, unadorned back of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear view of both figures' faces and red graffiti on the base.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in a dramatic, emotional pose
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed outdoors, likely in an urban public space or park, as indicated by the presence of graffiti and weathering.
